KAGGLE UPLOAD — Traffic Helmet Balanced Dataset
================================================

UPLOAD THESE TO KAGGLE:
-----------------------

1) DATASET (required)
   File: C:\projects\traffic-analytics-system\dist\helmet_detection_kaggle.zip
   Kaggle slug: traffic-helmet-balanced

2) NOTEBOOK (import on Kaggle)
   File: C:\projects\traffic-analytics-system\notebooks\kaggle_helmet_training.ipynb

3) WEIGHTS (optional — continue from partial model)
   File: C:\projects\traffic-analytics-system\models\helmet_detector.pt
   Kaggle slug: traffic-helmet-weights

ZIP CONTENTS:
  helmet_detection/data.yaml
  helmet_detection/train/images/  (40764 images)
  helmet_detection/train/labels/  (40764 labels)
  helmet_detection/valid/images/  (253 images)
  helmet_detection/valid/labels/  (253 labels)
  helmet_detection/test/images/   (123 images)
  helmet_detection/test/labels/   (123 labels)

KAGGLE STEPS:
  1. Create -> Dataset -> upload helmet_detection_kaggle.zip
  2. Create -> Notebook -> import kaggle_helmet_training.ipynb
  3. Settings -> GPU T4, Internet ON
  4. Add Input -> traffic-helmet-balanced
  5. Save & Run All
  6. Download helmet_detector.pt -> models/helmet_detector.pt

Full guide: docs/KAGGLE_HELMET_TRAINING.md
